name: Anise Cookies #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour three cookie sheets.
2. In a large bowl, with electric mixer on medium speed, beat eggs until very thick and light.
3. Gradually beat in sugar. Continue beating for 20 minutes longer.
4. At low speed, beat in flour, baking powder, salt; mix for 1 minute. Add anise extract; beat just until blended.
5. Drop by teaspoonfuls, about 1/2 inch apart, on prepared cookie sheets. Gently swirl each to form a circle.
6. Let stand at room temperature, uncovered, for 8 hours, or overnight.
7. Preheat oven to 325°F. Bake cookies for about 10 minutes, or until firm and smooth when pressed with a fingertip. Cool on wire racks. Store in an airtight container. Makes about 5 dozen.
